summary: No-commit rule not propagated to the bmad-dev-story delegate — delegate commits would silently bypass the Conductor write-scope guard.
detail: Step 2 passes no git constraint into the invocation; older references assert delegate commits.
evidence: Step 2: 'Invoke the bmad-dev-story skill. Pass the story file path.' — no git constraint
suggested_fix: Pass explicit no-commit constraint into the bmad-dev-story invocation; state the rule extends to every delegated skill.

summary: Conductor stage-1 commit uses git add -u which never stages untracked files — with dev forbidden to commit, new files are lost silently at worktree cleanup.
detail: Pre-existing conductor defect outside this story's writable scope; THIS BUILD compensated by explicit-path staging.
suggested_fix: Enumerate with git status --porcelain, guard over that set, stage in-scope paths explicitly.

summary: Fix-loop guard enumerates with git diff --name-only (blind to fixer-created files); git checkout -- P cannot discard out-of-scope untracked files.
detail: Pre-existing, out of story scope; consequential now fixer no longer stages.
suggested_fix: Enumerate with status --porcelain; git clean -f for untracked discards; explicit staging.

summary: Legacy sprint-dev seam broken: variants no longer commit, sprint-dev has no staging/commit step, Phase 3 rebases/merges empty branches — uncommitted work destroyed at cleanup.
detail: Directional decision needed: add commit step to sprint-dev, scope no-commit rule to Conductor spawns, or deprecate legacy path.
evidence: sprint-dev merge-ready handler has no git add/commit of dev output
suggested_fix: Decide: (a) stage+commit step in sprint-dev, (b) scope rule to Conductor-spawned, or (c) deprecate legacy path.

summary: stakes_class carried through 'unchanged' with no absent/invalid fallback though finding-schema declares routine default and stage-3 routes on this exact field.
detail: Unset/garbage stakes_class matches neither Rule 1 nor Rule 2; typo'd class silently skips DEC-036 escalation.
evidence: 'carry through unchanged' vs location's explicit fallback
suggested_fix: Apply schema default (routine) when absent; validate against four-class enum; off-enum = malformed.

location: merge/dedup rule (~462-466) x new mapping bullets
summary: Dedup keeps higher-severity record wholesale — qa's hardcoded suggested_fix:null erases cr remediation; independent stakes_class assessments can silently drop a DEC-036 escalation.
suggested_fix: Field-level merge: max severity, union non-null fields, most-severe stakes_class.
